package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for http_handler_without_csrf_protection: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: POST/PUT/DELETE handler registration without evidence of CSRF token middleware
type CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionModel
}

type CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtection(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtectionDTO) error {
    focus := "http_handler_without_csrf_protection"
    _ = focus
    http_handler_csrf_protection_negative := map[string]int{"http": 1, "handler": 2, "csrf": 3, "protection": 4}
    http_handler_csrf_protection_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_negative_0 := http_handler_csrf_protection_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_0
    handler_negative_1 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_1
    csrf_negative_2 := map[string]string{"csrf": input}
    _ = csrf_negative_2
    protection_negative_3 := http_handler_csrf_protection_negative["protection"] + len(input)
    _ = protection_negative_3
    return nil
}
